Minimum Average(s) Required: A minimum cumulative overall average of 60.0%.
See major for required major average (MAV).

Unit Requirements.description: Complete a minimum of 20.0 units, exceptions noted below.
exceptions: Students in the double degree academic plan: Minimum of 26.0 units.

Undergraduate Communication Requirement.description: All Bachelor of Computer Science students must complete two communications courses.

Bachelor of Computer Science and Bachelo: OR complete one course from List 1 and one course from List 2.

Additional Constraints and Notes: The first List 1 course must be taken on campus and completed with a minimum grade of 60% prior to enrolling in the 2A term.
Except for some double degree students, the first List 1 course should be taken during the first term in the Faculty of Mathematics.
Transfer credits may be used to satisfy the Undergraduate Communication Requirement.
Students who do not complete the first List 1 course prior to their 2A term will have a hold placed on their account and will be required to enrol in a List 1 course.

List 1: EMLS101R - Oral Communications for Academic Purposes (0.50)
EMLS102R - Clear Communication in English Writing (0.50)
List 2: EMLS104R - Reading and Listening for Academic Purposes (0.50)
EMLS110R - Communicating in Canadian Academic Contexts (0.50)
ENGL119 - Communications in Mathematics and Computer Science (0.50)
ENGL378 - Professional Communications in Statistics and Actuarial Science (0.50)
